title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 346.065 - Examinations, when held
text:
346.065.  Examinations, when held. — The board shall give examinations with sufficient frequency to permit applicants to be examined within six months following the submission of the license application.
(L. 1973 H.B. 396 & 257 § 13, A.L. 1995 S.B. 69, et al.)
